response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video identified Nakiri Ayame performing two songs: 'Hira Hira Hirara' (displayed on screen) and 'Gokuraku Jodo' (identified via audio and credit text at 04:30). 2. Performed searches: ' "ひらひらひらら" Japanese and English lyrics ' and ' "極楽浄土" GARNiDELiA Japanese and English lyrics '. 3. Obtained lyrics and metadata for both songs. 4. Constructed scene mapping based on song change at 04:30.
response.global_summary: The video is a 2-song medley performed by VTuber Nakiri Ayame, including 'Hira Hira Hirara' (originally by ClariS) and 'Gokuraku Jodo' (originally by GARNiDELiA).

scenes.description: Nakiri Ayame sings 'Hira Hira Hirara' with another character on a stage decorated with cherry blossoms. The song title is displayed on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ひらひらひらら
保証のないもの全て 壊してしまいたい
君が云ったあの約束も
今じゃひらひらひらひらら
...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Flowers fluttering down
I want to break everything without guarantee
Even that promise you made
Now just fluttering, fluttering
Like that...

scenes.description: The performance transitions to 'Gokuraku Jodo' with backup dancers in masks.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
月明かり昇る頃 灯る赤提灯
祭囃子の合図 ふわり蝶が誘い出す
ちょいと覗いて見てごらん
迷い込めば 抜け出せない
楽しいことがしたいなら
おいでませ極楽浄土
...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
When the moonlight rises, a red lantern is lit
A signal of festival music, butterflies fluttering and tempting me out
If you want to do something fun
Come on over to the Paradise Land
...
